items.title: Open document app UI kit
items.oneliner: React components for PDF, DOCX, XLSX, CSV, uploads, and e-signing cut weeks off document app frontends.

items.title: Datasette hosts custom SQL apps
items.oneliner: Plugin serves sandboxed HTML apps that run read and write SQL against Datasette without building a separate backend.

items.title: Self-hosted SMTP relay dashboard
items.oneliner: Dockerized FastAPI relay routes outbound mail across providers with quotas, logs, and multi-tenant admin controls.

items.title: Verified WebAssembly interpreter in Lean
items.oneliner: Lean 4 WebAssembly interpreter lets you execute and formally reason about WASM semantics in one codebase.

items.title: Open specification for better websites
items.oneliner: MIT-licensed website spec gives teams a concrete checklist for performance, accessibility, and cross-platform web quality.

items.title: Virtual machine of historic operating systems
items.oneliner: Single Linux VM bundles 1,700 preinstalled operating systems for testing, demos, and retro computing research.

items.title: Curated UI skills reference
items.oneliner: Practical guides on accessibility, motion, and frontend craft help design engineers level up interfaces fast.

items.title: DuckDB internals performance walkthrough
items.oneliner: Clear internals tutorial explains vectorized execution, columnar storage, and caching so you can reason about DuckDB performance.

items.title: Enterprise auth for MCP servers
items.oneliner: EMA for MCP centralizes OAuth in your IdP so users inherit server access without repeated consent prompts.

items.title: Cross-browser glass effect tutorial
items.oneliner: Hands-on CSS walkthrough shows how to build glass UI effects that stay performant and accessible across browsers.
